mentions.note: Down from $48 (June high) to low $20s despite good beat last quarter. Good company, bad stock. MVP anomaly; possible opportunity at depressed valuation. Reports next week; await clarity.
Trading 17x earnings with 8–9% full-year revenue growth guidance; secular e-commerce shift, market-share gains, margin expansion support thesis. Cheapest ever; buy even after 13% bounce.
Mary caller: high-growth retailer but hurt by war narrative like all retail; can't tell you to buy until war ends despite reasonable fundamentals; geopolitical risk too overpowering.
Online pet retailer trading cheap; may miss earnings like Petco. Monitor for consumer spending deterioration in pet category going forward.
Volatile pattern of undeserved declines followed by reversals. Stock lacks conviction support; pattern too exhausting for ownership.
